description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Python Wheels that runs on workflow dispatch and when a release is created. The workflow should have two jobs: build_sdist and build_wheels. The build_sdist job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install the build package, build a source distribution, and upload the resulting tarball to artifacts. The build_wheels job should run on multiple platforms (MacOS 10.15, Ubuntu Latest, Windows Latest), check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install cibuildwheel, build wheels with custom configuration, and upload the resulting wheels to artifacts.
